name: Capture-HPC-NG
description: Capture-HPC-NG (Honeypot). Tool: https://github.com/CERT-Polska/HSN-Capture-HPC-NG. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #517 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Capture-HPC-NG output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Capture-HPC-NG output file to parse instead of running it live.
